topStories.title: No End To Iran War: Trump Says Terms Not 'Good Enough Yet' For Ceasefire
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said on Sunday the terms to end the war with Iran "aren't good enough yet", indicating sustained military operations against the Islamic Republic as the war entered its 16th...

topStories.title: G1 would have completed ribbon-cuttings: Congress's dig at ECI
topStories.description: The Congress frequently uses the term 'G2' to take swipes at Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Home Minister Amit Shah, who are both from Gujarat.

topStories.title: Trump may hit Iran's Kharg Island few more times ‘just for fun’ as Washington wishes to dock allies in Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: US President faces political pressure and declining approval as he struggles to justify military actions in Iran, while Russia benefits from the conflict.

topStories.title: FPV drone slams into US military base in Iraq
topStories.description: Iraq's Iranian-backed Kataib Hezbollah has released drone video from an attack on the US's Victory Base in Baghdad.

topStories.title: CBSE cancels all Class 12 board exams in the Middle East amid US-Iran war
topStories.description: CBSE had already announced the cancellation of all Class 10 Board exams in the region and had rescheduled the Class 12 exams scheduled till March 16.

topStories.title: Barrage of US-Israeli strikes target Isfahan
topStories.description: A US-Israeli strike on a factory in Isfahan has killed least 15 people, according to Iranian media.

topStories.title: Former CIA chief reveals early knowledge of Israeli attack plans
topStories.description: Former CIA chief David Petraeus says the US attacked Iran to scuttle its ability to defend itself against Israel.

topStories.title: Iran’s Space Research Centre severely damaged in strikes
topStories.description: Video has revealed the Iranian Space Research Centre in Tehran has suffered significant damage from Israeli-US strikes.

topStories.title: Iran-Israel war: Benjamin Netanyahu's son goes ‘missing’; Yair’s unusual silence on social media sparks speculation
topStories.description: Yair Netanyahu's absence from social media has sparked speculation amid rising tensions between Israel and Iran. A US insider raised security concerns.

topStories.title: ‘Arrested without any evidence’: Political leaders welcome climate activist Sonam Wangchuk’s release
topStories.description: Sonam Wangchuk  was released from prison on Saturday, days before the Supreme Court's hearing of the plea filed by his wife challenging his detention.

topStories.title: US bounty on Mojtaba Khamenei? Washington offers $10 million for intel on Iran's new Supreme Leader, IRGC chiefs
topStories.description: US State Department has placed a $10 million (over  ₹83 crore) bounty on Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and senior IRGC officials under its Rewards for Justice programme, in Washington's boldest intelligence push against Tehran yet.

dailyNews.description: Congress is leading an alliance of opposition parties, including CPI(M) and Assam Jatiya Parishad, with the CPI (ML) Liberation also lending its support.

dailyNews.title: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Iran vows to kill ‘child-killing criminal’ Benjamin Netanyahu
dailyNews.description: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Iran urged civilians in the United Arab Emirates to leave areas around ports, docks, and what it called ‘American hideouts,’ claiming that United States forces had launched attacks on Iran from those locations.

dailyNews.title: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
dailyNews.description: They have engaged a lobbying firm with close ties to the US president to argue their case.

dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump says allies who rely on Gulf oil must help to keep the Strait of Hormuz open.

dailyNews.title: Iraq taking private plane to Mexico for World Cup play-off
dailyNews.description: Iraq will travel to Mexico by private plane for their World Cup play-off despite calls from coach Graham Arnold to postpone the match amid the escalating US-Israeli war with Iran, the country's FA president Adnan Dirjal says.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan strikes Afghan base after its president warns ‘red line’ crossed
dailyNews.description: Islamabad hits Kandahar facility after Taliban drones strike civilian areas and military sites as conflict intensifies.

dailyNews.title: Brazil’s jailed ex-president Bolsonaro hospitalised with lung infection
dailyNews.description: Far-right leader, whose persistent health woes are linked to 2018 stabbing, endorsed son to run in this year's election.

dailyNews.title: Congress releases second list of 23 candidates for Assam polls
dailyNews.description: Congress general secretary (organisation) K.C. Venugopal released the second list of candidates for the 126-member Assembly; the party also left 15 seats for its alliance partners

dailyNews.title: Exiled Iranian crown prince says he’s ready to lead Iran ‘as soon as the Islamic Republic falls’
dailyNews.description: Exiled Iranian Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi says he's ready to lead Iran's transition as conflict enters third week and regime faces potential collapse.

dailyNews.title: Kim Jong Un appears with teenage daughter at live-fire rocket test in North Korea
dailyNews.description: Kim Jong Un's daughter joins him at missile test, fueling ongoing succession speculation as North Korea escalates weapons demonstrations amid regional tensions.

dailyNews.title: Seahawks GM warns Washington’s new 'millionaire tax' could hurt free agent recruiting
dailyNews.description: Seahawks general manager John Schneider pointed to Washington’s new income tax rate on millionaires, warning it could hinder the franchise’s ability to sign top NFL free agents.

dailyNews.title: Headless, handless body found on New York road 56 years ago identified through DNA; killer remains unknown
dailyNews.description: A DNA breakthrough identified a headless body found in New York 56 years ago as Clyde Coppage from Pennsylvania, but his killer still remains at large.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

dailyNews.title: Trump Wins When Oscar Winners Stay Silent
dailyNews.description: Right now it does matter a lot whether actors can find the right words.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Didn’t Know About Iran
dailyNews.description: Ali Vaez, the Iran project director at the International Crisis Group, explains the history of miscalculations that led to the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump said that other countries would join the U.S. in sending warships to the Strait of Hormuz, but did not share more specifics.

dailyNews.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr says broadcast licenses are not a "property right"
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump asks China, France, others to help keep Strait of Hormuz open amid war in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump called on countries like the U.K., France, South Korea, Japan and even China to help keep the Strait of Hormuz open as Iran tries to strangle the flow of oil from the region. Charlie D'Agata reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire but he's not ready to make a deal
dailyNews.description: In a wide-ranging interview, President Donald Trump said he’s not ready to make a deal to end the war with Iran, despite Iran’s willingness to do so.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
